Rules: Start from 3 points per exercise and deduct per sub-criterion.
Apply an additional discretionary penalty up to -1 if minor issues exist despite meeting criteria (e.g., sloppiness, unclear reasoning, small but notable mistakes).
Discretionary is a deduction only; never increases points.

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Executes code to explore data. Expect `skimr::skim(`.
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Uses skimr::skim to evaluate data outputting three groups: a summary, and separate details on categorical/factor & numerical

Ex1.DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): Code does not execute to completion.

Ex2.Criteria: Split Data into Training and Testing sets

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Uses rsample::initial_split, rsample::training and rsample::testing. Expect prop = 0.75
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Uses four executable steps. Expect `initial_split(`, `training(.lm(` and `testing(`.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): expect ames_train with 2197 rows and ames_test with 733 rows.

Ex3.Criteria: Recipe Creation and Examination of Center and Scale Steps

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): With ames_train, uses recipes::recipe. Expect `recipes::recipe(` and recipes::step_X for various X, with steps in correct order
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Uses `recipes::prep(training = ames_train)` with `broom::tidy()` to examine step outputs. Expect `recipes::prep(`.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Expect output of `broom::tidy(1)` and broom_tidy(2) to calculate means and standard deviations respectively. Compare to `dplyr::select`, `dplyr::summarise`, and `tidyr::pivot_longer` output.

Ex3.Checks: DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): Recipe steps in wrong order or scaling/centering not correct.

Ex4.Criteria: Model Specification with `lm`, `glmnet`, and `ranger using parsnip::

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Specifies three linear regression models. Expect `lm(` and `geom_smooth(` or `abline(`.
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Follows the two-dataset workflow and visualizes correctly.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): `Computational engine: lm`, `Computational engine: glmnet`, and `Computational engine: ranger` with `parsnip::tune` arguments for the gmlnet and ranger models.

Ex4.DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): Model specfied incorrectly or specification does not execute.

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): parsnip::translate() applied to models greated in Ex4 - lm_mod_base, lm_mod_glmnet, lm_mod_rforest
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Correctly produces model specifications with model arguments, engine, and fit template.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Expect stats::lm(, glmnet::glmnet(, and ranger::ranger( with parsnip:tune(

Ex5.DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): Traslation fails to execute and generate native model specification

Ex6.Criteria: Create Bootstrap Datasets from the Ames Housing Training Set

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Applies rsample::bootstraps to ames training set. Expect `rsample::bootstraps(` creating variable `train_resamples`
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Defines `train_resamples` from ames_train bootstrap samples. Expect `rsample::bootstraps(`.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Row count of `train_resamples` is 25 with 2 columns.

Ex7.Criteria: Create `workflowset` to Contain List of Recipes and List of Models

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Combines list of recipes and list of models into a workflowset. Expect `workflowsets::workflow_set(`
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Uses a list of one recipe and a list of three models. Recipe from and Ex3 and models from Ex4.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Variable all_workflows is a data.frame with 4 columns. Output if `all_workflows |> tidyr::unnest(info)` has 3 rows and 7 columns.

Ex8.Criteria: Process Cross Product of Recipe and Models

Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Extracts fit metrics from `all_workflows` and filters for `rmse` metric. Arrange models by descending metric values. Expect `tidyr::unnest(`, `dplyr::filter(`, and `dplyr::arrange(`
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Result is a data.frame with 3 rows and 12 columns. Expect columns `penalty`, `mixture`, `trees`, and `min_n`.

Ex8.DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): Sequence of operations fails to execute.

Ex9.Criteria: Rank Model Performance Metrics by RMSE

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Ranks models by rmse. The metric rsq also appears in group. Expect `workflowsets::rank_results(`.
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Produces columns `.metric`, `mean`, and `std_err`. Expect `rank_metric = 'rmse'` and `select_best = TRUE`.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Produces a data.frame with 6 rows and 9 columns.

Ex9.DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): Fuction `workflowsets::rank_results(` fails to execute to completion.

Ex10.Criteria: Rank Model Performance Metrics by RMSE and Fit Best Model to Train and Test Sets. Compare Traind and Test by MSE

Checks.CodeExecution (1 pt): Pulls workflow by column `wflow_id`. Finalize workflow with tuned parameters and compare fits on test and train sets. Expect `tune::finalize_workflow(` and `tibble::tibble(trees = 1, min_n = 11)`.
Checks.ProcessFidelity (1 pt): Fits best model using corresponding tuning parameters and compares OOB prediction errors (MSE) in test vs train data. Expect `fit(` and `best_model_workflow`.
Checks.OutputAccuracy (1 pt): Ratio of MSE test/train is 0.1146112, or 12% higher in the test dataset than in the training dataset

Ex10.DiscretionaryPenalty (up to -1 pt): The function `tune::finalize_workflow(` fails to execute or either of fits on test and train fail to execute.
